title: Implement Circuit-Breaker State Integration
description: Implement circuit-breaker patterns by modeling dependency statuses ("Open," "Half-Open," "Closed") as first-class states. Integrate circuit-breaker logic into state machines to enhance resilience against failing external services.
objectives: Implement circuit-breaker patterns by modeling dependency statuses ("Open," "Half-Open," "Closed") as first-class states.
Integrate circuit-breaker logic into state machines to enhance resilience against failing external services.
